code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut current = 0
mut has_digits = false
mut negative = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if has_digits
      if negative
        sum = sum + (-current)
      else
        sum = sum + current
      end
      count = count + 1
      current = 0
      has_digits = false
      negative = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    negative = true
  else if b == 43
    has_digits = has_digits
  else
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    has_digits = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has_digits
  if negative
    sum = sum + (-current)
  else
    sum = sum + current
  end
  count = count + 1
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
